models.hero: Top section of the landing page — headline, subheadline, and primary CTA.
models.feature: A feature highlight card with a title, description, and image placeholder.
models.footer: Bottom section with contact email, social links, and copyright.

relationships: The landing page composes hero, features array, and footer into a single marketing view.

hero.headline: Turn Your Photos Into Beautiful Books
hero.subheadline: Design, preview, and print stunning photo books — delivered to your door.

features.title: Upload Your Photos
features.description: Bring your favourite memories together. Upload from your phone, computer, or cloud storage in seconds.

features.title: Arrange Your Layouts
features.description: Choose from beautiful templates and drag photos into place. Every page, your way.

features.title: Order a Printed Copy
features.description: When you're happy with your design, order your book. Premium printing, delivered worldwide.
